calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for default judgment against Defendant AAR Group Corp.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:31:00 a.m. , concluding at 9:38:51 a.m. (D505)

Eric Jun, Esq. representing Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant AAR Group Corp not appearing.
Witness Benjamin Seeman sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for open book account, account stated, reasonable value and breach of contract filed Sep-13-2023.
Proof of substituted service as to defendant filed Sep-20-2023; effectuated on Oct-02-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Jan-02-2024.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 10 on Jan-31-2024.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to offer proof as to witness testimony.
The Court examines witness.
Witness confirms that counsel's statements are true and correct. Witness confirms that the declaration submitted is true and correct.

Based on the testimony, statements made, exhibits and declarations submitted, the Court finds in favor of the Plaintiff and GRANTS judgment against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant:
Damages $30,940.00
Interest $5,139.25
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $522.58
Total Judgment $39,426.83

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To May-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
